name: GHG Protocol Corporate Standard — Self Study
description: Essential foundation for any climate consultant. Covers Scope 1, 2, 3 accounting methodology.

name: ISO 14064 Lead Verifier
description: Internationally recognised credential to conduct third-party GHG verification audits.

name: Sustainability and Climate Risk (SCR®)
description: Covers climate risk, TCFD, transition risk, physical risk — ideal for finance-side consultancy.

name: CBAM Practitioner — EU Academy
description: Covers CBAM reporting obligations, embedded emissions calculation, and registry use.

name: Certified Carbon Credit Professional
description: Covers voluntary carbon markets, credit quality, project standards and buyer needs.

name: BRSR Reporting Specialist
description: Covers SEBI BRSR framework, NGRBC principles, and assurance requirements for listed companies.
